name: Borrowed Authority
windowEffect: Return 1 player's command token from your tactic pool and perform a tactical action in a non-home, non-Mecatol Rex system with no other player's units, using a token form that player's reinforcements.

name: Seize Command
window: When you spend influence to gain 1 or more command tokens:
windowEffect: You may place 1 other player's control token into your tactic pool instead of gaining 1 of those command tokens. You may only have 1 of each player's control tokens in your tactic pool.

name: Diplomatic Immunity
permanentEffect: You do not have to spend a command token to use the secondary ability of the Diplomacy strategy card. Other players cannot place your tokens for the primary effect of Diplomacy.

name: Mandate of Presence
window: Once per action phase, when you perform a strategic action:
windowEffect: Select 1 player and 1 system that contains 1 or more of your units, no legendary planets, and no other player's units. That player places 1 command token from their reinforcements in that system.

name: Lobbyist Dues
window: During the agenda phase, if an outcome that you voted for or predicted is not resolved:
windowEffect: Gain commodities equal to the number of players who voted for the outcome that was resolved.

name: Tight Deadlines
window: After the first agenda is revealed
windowEffect: Draw 3 agendas and place them in your hand. When an agenda would be revealed, you may reveal 1 agenda from your hand instead. At the end of the agenda phase, place the remaining agendas on the bottom of the deck in any order.

name: Echo of the Anvil
window: When you produce 2 or more units:
windowEffect: Reduce the combined cost by 1 if you produced at least 2 units of the same type.

name: Factory Lease
window: During setup, gain the Factory Lease promissory notes. At the start of the agenda phase:
windowEffect: You may produce 1 unit other than a war sun in a system containing 1 of your space docks and no other players ships for each Factory Lease attachment on the game board.

name: Expeditionary Cache
window: When you gain 1 or more commodities:
windowEffect: You may spend any number of commodities to place expedition tokens on planets, up to the number of commodities spent.

name: Shared Discoveries
window: At the end of a player's tactical action:
windowEffect: You may remove 1 expedition token from a planet the active player controls in that system to allow them to explore that planet as if it were any trait.

name: Colony Outposts
window: At the end of a tactical action that you explored a planet:
windowEffect: You may spend 1 command token to reveal cards from that planet's exploration deck until you reveal an attachment. Resolve that exploration and shuffle the revealed cards back into the deck.
